title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Franky, CP9, Spandam, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Franky, CP9, Spandam, Unknown person #1, Luffy, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: All right, wait for me, Robin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That pigeon Guy!!! I'll send him flying!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I... heard a loud noise just now...

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: I... never received an order to...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I see you're quick to run away.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Chapapapa. There's no reason for me

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: To purposely take your prideful punches!

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Franky, CP9, Spandam, Unknown person #1, Luffy, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice.
